subcodes.title: Doa Mitia Apunt
subcodes.first_line:
## Doa Mitia Apunt

O Topa Raja koih! Nyinung nyabal koih pakai budi Ingan sok oni sija dek boleh jadi pangibu’ui tudu I
subcodes.notes: Author: The Báb (BB). Teaching prayer (section Doa Mitia Apunt = Prayer for Teaching in Bau Bidayuh). Not found in inventory. X-code candidate (XBB).
